creator: gemellus2@yahoo.com
text:
This is my e-mail address for communication.  Sorry for the typos in the original message.  They were partly due to using a mobile device to send the PR.

Please find attached the dmesg, pciconf -lv, kldstat, Xorg.0.log, and the actual Xorg stderr messages received when running as root with 'Xorg -config xorg.config.new'.  The xorg.config.new was generated by 'Xorg -configure'.  The kldstat was taken after Xorg had been run once.

Assistance would be very much appreciated.

Be a better friend, newshound, and know-it-all with Yahoo! Mobile. Try it now.
